content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Fools and Roads". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/191/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of cities. Then, there are n lines, each containing two integers, which represent the two cities connected by a road. The next line contains an integer m, which is the number of queries. Then, there are m lines, each containing two integers, which represent the two cities to check if they are connected by a road.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print 'YES' if the two cities are connected by a road, otherwise print 'NO'.

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.expectedOutput:
YES
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO

hidden.label: general mixed case
hidden.expectedOutput:
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES
YES

solution.approach: Use a Union Find data structure to keep track of the connected components in the graph.
